title: Billing dispute intake
excerpt: Confirm charge date and amount, offer itemized receipt, escalate only if charge is unauthorized or duplicate.

title: Account access recovery
excerpt: Verify identity via registered email, reset session tokens, never share passwords over chat.

title: Service outage response
excerpt: Acknowledge regional impact, link status page, do not promise ETA unless ops has published one.

title: Refund eligibility
excerpt: Refunds within 14 days for unused seats; prorate annual plans; require manager approval above $500.

title: Security incident triage
excerpt: Preserve logs, rotate compromised keys, notify security on-call; never ask customers for full card numbers.

title: General escalation
excerpt: Capture severity, customer impact, and desired outcome; route to human review when policy is ambiguous.
